name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi provides income support of ₹6,000 per year to all landholding farmer families across the country, paid in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each. The scheme aims to supplement the financial needs of farmers for procuring various inputs to ensure proper crop health and appropriate yields.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year transferred directly to bank account in 3 installments of ₹2,000 each (April-July, August-November, December-March).
documents_required: Land Ownership Records / Land Registration Documents
application_process: Apply online through PM-Kisan portal (pmkisan.gov.in) or visit nearest Common Service Centre (CSC). Farmers can also register through State Nodal Officers.

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
description: PM Vishwakarma aims to strengthen and nurture the Guru-Shishya tradition of traditional artisans and craftspeople. The scheme provides recognition, skill training, toolkit incentive, credit support, and incentive for digital transactions and marketing support.
benefits: Skill training with stipend of ₹500/day, toolkit incentive of ₹15,000, collateral-free loans up to ₹3 lakh at 5% interest rate, digital transactions incentive, and marketing support.
application_process: Register at pmvishwakarma.gov.in. Verification by Gram Panchayat (rural) or ULB (urban). After verification, enroll for skill training.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
description: MUDRA (Micro Units Development and Refinance Agency) provides loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises. Three categories: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishore (₹50,001 to ₹5 lakh), and Tarun (₹5,00,001 to ₹10 lakh). No collateral required.
benefits: Collateral-free business loans: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishore (up to ₹5 lakh), Tarun (up to ₹10 lakh). Competitive interest rates. No processing fee.
application_process: Apply at any bank, NBFC, or MFI. Visit mudra.org.in for authorized lending institutions. Submit business plan with loan application.

name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
description: The world's largest health insurance scheme providing health coverage of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization. Covers pre and post-hospitalization expenses. Over 1,500 health packages covering surgery, medical treatments, and diagnostics.
benefits: Health insurance coverage of ₹5 lakh per family per year. Cashless treatment at empaneled hospitals. Covers 1,500+ medical packages. Pre and post hospitalization expenses covered.
application_process: Check eligibility on mera.pmjay.gov.in. Visit nearest Ayushman Mitra at empaneled hospital or Common Service Centre to create e-card.

name: Startup India Initiative
description: Startup India is a flagship initiative to build a strong ecosystem for nurturing innovation and startups. Recognized startups get tax benefits, easier compliance, patent/IPR support, funding support through Fund of Funds, and networking opportunities.
benefits: Income tax exemption for 3 years, self-certification compliance, fast-track patent applications at 80% rebate, access to Fund of Funds (₹10,000 crore), networking through Startup India Hub.
benefits_amount: Tax exemption + Fund of Funds access
application_process: Register on startupindia.gov.in. Apply for DPIIT Recognition. Submit required documents for approval.
ministry: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana
description: PMKVY is the flagship skill development scheme enabling youth to take up industry-relevant skill training leading to better livelihood and employment. Provides free skill training, certification, and placement assistance.
benefits: Free skill training, NSQF certification, training allowance of ₹500/day, placement assistance, accidental insurance of ₹2 lakh during training.
application_process: Visit pmkvyofficial.org to find training centers. Enroll directly at authorized training center. Complete skill assessment and get certified.
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

name: National Scholarship Portal - Post Matric Scholarship
description: Post Matric Scholarship for students from SC/ST/OBC/Minority communities pursuing studies beyond Class 10. Covers tuition fees, maintenance allowance, and other academic expenses.
benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement, maintenance allowance (₹380-1200/month depending on course), book and equipment grant.
application_process: Apply on scholarships.gov.in during the application window (usually August-November). Submit verified documents through institution.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / Ministry of Tribal Affairs

name: Stand-Up India
description: Stand-Up India facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and at least one Woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise in manufacturing, services, or trading.
benefits: Composite loans of ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for greenfield enterprises. Includes term loan and working capital. Repayable in 7 years with moratorium up to 18 months.
application_process: Apply through standupmitra.in portal or approach nearest bank branch. Bank credit committee evaluates the proposal.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin
description: PM Awas Yojana (Gramin) provides financial assistance for construction of pucca houses with basic amenities to eligible rural houseless and those living in kutcha/dilapidated houses.
benefits: Financial assistance of ₹1.20 lakh (plain areas) and ₹1.30 lakh (hilly/difficult areas) for construction of houses with basic amenities including toilet, LPG connection, electricity, and drinking water.
application_process: Selection through SECC-2011 data verified by Gram Sabha. Apply through AwaasSoft or visit Gram Panchayat office.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana is a savings scheme for the girl child, offering one of the highest interest rates among government small savings schemes with tax benefits under Section 80C.
benefits: Interest rate of 8.2% per annum (compounded yearly). Tax-free maturity proceeds. EEE (Exempt-Exempt-Exempt) tax status. Partial withdrawal allowed after girl turns 18.
application_process: Open account at any post office or authorized bank with minimum deposit of ₹250. Maximum 2 accounts per family.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Atal Pension Yojana guarantees a minimum pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month to subscribers after the age of 60 years. The government co-contributes 50% of the premium for eligible subscribers.
benefits: Guaranteed pension of ₹1,000-5,000/month after age 60. Spouse receives same pension after subscriber's death. Nominee gets lump sum. Government co-contribution for non-taxpayers.
documents_required: Mobile Number linked with Bank Account
application_process: Visit any bank where savings account is held. Fill APY registration form. Select pension amount and contribution frequency.

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
description: Provides free LPG connections to women from Below Poverty Line (BPL) households, aiming to safeguard the health of women and children by providing clean cooking fuel.
benefits: Free LPG connection, first refill free, free hot plate (stove), financial assistance of ₹1,600 per connection. Subsidy on subsequent refills via DBT.
application_process: Apply at nearest LPG distributor (HP, Bharat, Indane). Can also apply online through pmuy.gov.in. Submit KYC documents.
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas

name: PM SVANidhi - Street Vendor Scheme
description: PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi provides affordable working capital loans to street vendors to resume their livelihoods affected by COVID-19. Loans in 3 tiers with no collateral.
benefits: First loan: ₹10,000. Second loan: ₹20,000. Third loan: ₹50,000. Interest subsidy of 7%. Cashback incentive for digital transactions. No collateral needed.
documents_required: Vending Certificate / Letter of Recommendation from ULB
application_process: Apply on pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in. Can also visit nearest bank, NBFC, or MFI. ULB verification required.
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Maternity benefit program providing ₹5,000 in 3 installments to pregnant women and lactating mothers for the first living child, and ₹6,000 for the second child (if girl).
benefits: ₹5,000 for first child in 3 installments (₹1,000 + ₹2,000 + ₹2,000). Additional ₹6,000 for second child if it is a girl. Benefits transferred via DBT.
application_process: Register at Anganwadi Centre or nearest health facility. Apply through PMMVY-CAS portal. Submit required documents for each installment.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
description: NAPS promotes apprenticeship training in establishments by sharing 25% of prescribed stipend (up to ₹1,500/month) with employers and reimbursing cost of basic training.
benefits: Government shares 25% of stipend up to ₹1,500/month. Basic training cost reimbursed up to ₹7,500/month per apprentice. Industry-recognized certification.
application_process: Register on apprenticeshipindia.gov.in. Search for apprenticeship opportunities. Apply to establishments directly through portal.
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
